fields.name: rangerAdminUsername
fields.label: Ranger Admin username
fields.help: Admin user KDPS uses to create the plugin repository and policies on this Ranger. Enter it (with the password below) to have KDPS talk to Ranger DIRECTLY over REST — required for an EXTERNAL Ranger, and also usable for a managed/internal one when you'd rather KDPS own the credential than delegate to the Ambari server.

fields.name: rangerAdminPassword
fields.label: Ranger Admin password
fields.help: Admin password paired with the username above. When BOTH are set, every Ranger operation (repository creation, policy/grant creation) for services wired to this context runs directly against ranger Admin URL. Leave BOTH blank on a managed context to keep delegating those operations to the Ambari server, which holds the credential (the pre-existing behaviour).
